title: potato-performance-base-pack
description: Pure power on lowend PCs, shaders without gpu, add mods if you want!
body:
### Pure performance on low spec, follow the mod authors and add mods if u want!

This Modpack should allow you to use minecraft, on the highest fps possible on your device! If u cant play vannila because of low FPS anymore, use this instead!

This modpack is only focussed on adding performance mods to boost your gaming experience.
 
**IMPORTANT
Also disable the shader before you join into a world or server, to avoid crashing your game.**
